# Substrate atlas (generated contract)

**Regenerate:** from repo root, with a local app DB available to worldcli (default path):

```bash
cd src-tauri && cargo run --bin worldcli -- substrates --emit-markdown ../docs/SUBSTRATE_ATLAS.md
```
